BiViewDefinition.label: Patient Registrations By Facility Age Ranges
BiViewDefinition.name: patient_reg_view_agg

div.span: Provides an aggregate view of the registration view by facility aggregations by age range

grouping.column: registration || EXTRACT(MONTH FROM reg_date) || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM reg_date) || gender

CASE WHEN AGE(reg_date, birth_date) < '1 MONTH' THEN '0 - 1 Mo' WHEN AGE(reg_date, birth_date) < '3 MONTH' THEN '1 - 3 Mo' WHEN AGE(reg_date, birth_date) < '6 MONTH' THEN '3 - 6 Mo' WHEN AGE(reg_date, birth_date) < '12 MONTH' THEN '6 - 12 Mo' WHEN AGE(reg_date, birth_date) < '18 MONTH' THEN '12 - 18 Mo' WHEN AGE(reg_date, birth_date) < '5 YEAR' THEN '18 Mo - 5 Yr' WHEN AGE(reg_date, birth_date) < '12 YEAR' THEN '6 - 12 Yr' WHEN AGE(reg_date, birth_date) < '18 YEAR' THEN '12 - 18 Yr' WHEN AGE(reg_date, birth_date) < '30 YEAR' THEN '19 - 30 Yr' WHEN AGE(reg_date, birth_date) < '45 YEAR' THEN '31 - 45 Yr' WHEN AGE(reg_date, birth_date) < '65 YEAR' THEN '45 - 65 Yr' ELSE '> 66 Yr' END

CASE WHEN (reg_date - birth_date) / 86400 < 30 THEN '0 - 1 Mo' WHEN (reg_date - birth_date) / 86400 < 90 THEN '1 - 3 Mo' WHEN (reg_date - birth_date) / 86400 < 180 THEN '3 - 6 Mo' WHEN (reg_date - birth_date) / 86400 < 365 THEN '6 - 12 Mo' WHEN (reg_date - birth_date) / 86400 < 540 THEN '12 - 18 Mo' WHEN (reg_date - birth_date) / 86400 < 1825 THEN '18 Mo - 5 Yr' WHEN (reg_date - birth_date) / 86400 < 4380 THEN '6 - 12 Yr' WHEN (reg_date - birth_date) / 86400 < 6570 THEN '12 - 18 Yr' WHEN (reg_date - birth_date) / 86400 < 10957 THEN '19 - 30 Yr' WHEN (reg_date - birth_date) / 86400 < 16436 THEN '31 - 45 Yr' WHEN (reg_date - birth_date) / 86400 < 23741 THEN '45 - 65 Yr' ELSE '> 66 Yr' END
